Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sopharanatoth]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Sopharanatoth is a dragon of the gold bloodline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Sophara's soulfire sets her apart from other gold dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Sophara's face is almost entirely human except for her eyes and patches of scales on her cheeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Sopharanatoth is a dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — Sopharanatoth has shrieking laughter.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Sopharanatoth is a gold dragon with the power of an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Sopharanatoth follows the Path of the Flowing Flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Sopharanatoth is a sacred beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Sophara has scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Sophara has an aura-born voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Sophara has wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Sopharanatoth is a strong fighter who was fought by Yerin and Mercy after her younger sister's death in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Sopharanatoth is the leader of the gold dragon team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Sopharanatoth's human form has patches of gold scales on her cheeks and the backs of her hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — The gold-scaled Sopharanatoth burns through black soldiers and their base.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Sophara used Flowing Flame madra on the box.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sopharanatoth was first place overall in the tenth test.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sophara holds first place in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sophara is a gold dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sophara's name is Sopharanatoth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sophara is also known as Sopharanatoth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sophara is an opponent whose performance was recorded on a dream tablet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Sophara's spirit is strong enough that Lindon suspected she might be an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Sophara is a competitor Lindon intends to ambush.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Sophara is frightening to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Sophara is running.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Sophara is a dragon-girl with golden scales and a tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Sophara possesses a floating disc that makes her nearly immune to Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Sophara is physically stronger than everyone except Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Sophara utilizes ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Sophara's ghostwater supply is limited to a single drop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Sophara can unleash a tide of golden flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Sophara has golden eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Sophara was carrying two crowns before being passed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Sopharanatoth is of the line of gold dragons and a chosen of Seshethkunaaz.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Sophara holds a bottled elixir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon has been running mental battles against Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Sophara fell to her knees.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Sophara is a fighter in the competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Sopharanatoth is one of the two most favored to win the competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sophara is attempting advancement while coiled in a circle of eight natural treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sophara experienced pain and fear following a failed advancement attempt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sophara's spirit channels are visualized as a network of bright orange lines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Sophara has a snout and a head larger than the Herald's entire body in her current form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy mentions a potential match against Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Sophara is a competitor in the tournament prepared by the gold dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Sophara has been given many enhancements for the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Sophara's match settled the roster of the eight Uncrowned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Sophara's signature would be gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Sophara is a character Yerin wants to beat in a month.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy intends to defeat Sophara herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Fury personally killed Sophara's great-aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara is a dragon who uses water and fire aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara has used the Gate of Heaven elixir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses a mental power elixir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses a Madra Engine that processes blood and life essence into madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses the Quickriver technique in the form of a saber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses the Riverflame Dance technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara has an Overlord-level body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses a whip called Quickriver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses the Azure Moon Reigns technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses the Crimson Sun Rises technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses the Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses the Enforced whip technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses the Nightworm Venom technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Sophara uses the Strings of Shadow technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Sopharanatoth defeated Akura Malice’s daughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Sophara has advanced to Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon loses to an illusory version of Sophara created by Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — There is a fight against Sophara that Malice may not be pleased about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Sophara is a person whom others are trying to express confidence in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Sophara is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Sophara's spiritual channels are being worn out by the Symbiote Veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Sophara is an opponent in the finals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Sophara is Malice's daughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Sophara obliterated Brother Aekin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Sophara used her Enforcer technique and her dragon's breath to defeat Brother Aekin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Sophara had a match against Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin is going into battle against Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara's spirit was unraveling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara burns ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara's fighting style was analyzed by Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara is a character who uses an Archlord weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara defeated Yerin by decapitating her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sophara possesses the Dragon King’s Totem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sophara is a character who wielded the Endless Sword to protect an unconscious Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sophara is Sopharanatoth of the gold dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sophara uses Quickriver in the form of a short, broad sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sophara possesses an Imperial Aegis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sophara can turn to white light and disperse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Sophara's head had gold light condensing over it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Sophara is a sacred artist whose spirit is finished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Sophara used an Enforcer technique, a shield, and a liquid whip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Sophara clashed with Mercy on a narrow ridge of stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Sophara intercepted Lindon with her tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Sophara was fighting Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Sophara used Quickriver to pour madra into a binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Sophara went from the arena to an assassination attempt on Mercy and Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon stood over a hopeless Sophara.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Sophara fought outside Sky's Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Sophara possesses a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Sophara had a void key and a Heaven’s Torch.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — The Dawn Sky Palace was stolen from Sophara.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — The gold dragons pumped Sopharanatoth as full as they dared, causing critical instability in her spirit.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Sophara's body was still warm outside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon was supposed to fight Sophara.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
